profession: Emissary of Peace and Trade Ambassador
stance: Diplomatic Neutrality with a Focus on Economic Prosperity
vita: Having grown up in the bustling trade hub city-state of Zypheron, I've learned that prosperity comes from peaceful coexistence and fair exchange. My family has always valued negotin... 20 years ago my father established a small but successful interstellar trading post which expanded into one of the largest in our sector through hard work and respect for all species.
portrait_prompt: A dignified Vor'Tak emissary, with silver-hued skin reflecting their race’s natural luminescence. Wearing a traditional diplomat uniform adorned with the sigil of Zypheron city-state on his chest and sleeves, he stands poised in front of an ornate desk laden with holographic trade records from across the galaxy.
